# llms.txt for how-to-scrape-milanuncios

## Project Overview

Milanuncios scraper and Spanish classifieds data extraction API. Extract cars, property, phones, and second-hand listings with EUR prices, images, and seller profiles from milanuncios.com with this Apify Actor. Playwright browser automation with ES residential proxies. Free tier included.

## Repository

- GitHub: https://github.com/getascraper/how-to-scrape-milanuncios
- Apify Actor: https://apify.com/getascraper/milanuncios-scraper

## Key Features

- Extract cars, property, phones, second-hand listings
- EUR price normalization and raw price strings
- Car attributes: year, mileage, fuel, transmission, hp, warranty
- Seller profiles: type (private/professional), name, location
- Location: city, province, region
- Images array

## Output Format

JSON with fields: id, url, title, description, postedDate, scrapedAt, price, priceRaw, previousPrice, currency, city, province, region, address, sellerType, sellerName, year, mileage, fuel, transmission, hp, warranty, images

## Technology Stack

- TypeScript
- Playwright (browser automation)
- ES residential proxies
- ESM modules

## Usage

Requires Apify account and API token. Run via Apify Console or API.

## Support

Open an issue at https://github.com/getascraper/how-to-scrape-milanuncios/issues
